rules_evaluated.evidence: Two registry-expanded prompts. Read-deliberately + introspect-on-skip both forcing functions in prompts. /context is a slash command, not a prompt.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Self-report charity — verify at the artifact.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Body line 33: 'Assume 10% of what Claude says or does is misrepresentation. Could be more, could be less. Spot-check by quoting back a specific file or function and asking Claude to confirm it.' /context is the artifact-side verification.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Context-loading tiers — /context shows the bounded window.
rules_evaluated.evidence: Body line 41: '/context shows total used and breakdown by category (system prompt, messages, memory, skills).' Auto-load surface earns its name through the slash command.
